criteria.name: 内存分析（模型权重、KV cache）
criteria.details: Section 2 provides detailed memory analysis: model weights 144GB (FP16), KV cache ~2.5MB/token, memory per card breakdown for TP=1/2/4/8 configurations. KV cache calculation clearly shown.

criteria.name: 明确建议PD策略（混合或分离）
criteria.details: Section 3 clearly recommends 'PD Separation (1P1D)' with detailed rationale covering latency-sensitivity, compute vs memory-bound characteristics, and throughput targets. Decision criteria table provided.

criteria.name: TP/EP/DP并行策略配置
criteria.details: Section 4 provides full parallel config: Prefill TP=8/EP=8/DP=1, Decode TP=1/EP=8/DP=7. Section 5 verifies constraint checks (TP<=cards_per_node, TP*DP<=EP, etc.).

criteria.name: 总卡数需求
criteria.details: Input summary states 64 cards total (8 nodes x 8 cards). Deployment config shows 8 cards for prefill + 56 cards for decode = 64 total. Constraint verification confirms total cards <= available.

criteria.name: 吞吐量估算
criteria.details: Prefill: ~300,000 tokens/s, Decode: ~50,000 tokens/s, Total: ~50K tokens/s (meets target). Section 7 mentions utilization estimate 85-90%.

summary: Excellent output. All 5 criteria fully met with detailed analysis, clear recommendations, and comprehensive parallel strategy configurations.
